title: Algorithm Developer
notes: Conducted research and developed algorithms to detect hydrocarbon gas using multispectral imaging. Designed and implemented testing software for a third-generation video tracking algorithm for high-end security systems. Worked with a team to productize algorithms using Microsoft C#, C++, and OpenCV. Developed a Windows-based algorithm testing framework using Python, Cygwin, and Bash. Designed a battery-operated, portable surveillance system for research, testing, and demonstrations.

title: Professional Consultant
notes: Consulted on computer vision and pattern recognition methods for tire engineering. Developed and delivered a four-hour professional training course on using MATLAB as a tool for engineering research.

title: Robotics Engineer
notes: Supervised installation of 6-7 axis robotic systems, including assembly, programming, system design, and debugging. Served as an on-site systems specialist for unique system applications, with extensive international travel.

title: Liaison Engineering Co-Op
notes: Authored hundreds of aerospace and mechanical engineering reports and analyses for airline structural repairs. Integrated specially designed repairs into maintenance manuals. Developed and maintained a multi-user interface and database for tracking engineering requests.
